CONTROL.NAME: ComboBox16
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: The current status of this hire booking

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox20
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Use this area for general information about this hire booking, special arrangements made with the customer, different collection address, times, parcel references, etc

CONTROL.NAME: CheckBox7
CONTROL.CAPTION: Pickup Arranged
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Tick if the collection of the equipment has been arranged, don't forget to describe in the General Notes field too

CONTROL.NAME: CheckBox8
CONTROL.CAPTION: DB label printed
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Tick if the Despatch Bay label has been printed off

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox24
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Method of sending and collecting the hired equipment

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox11
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: The same-day courier's job reference number

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox13
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: The delivery or collection cost to go on the invoice

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox41
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of boxes that the order is packed into

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox21
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Name of the business to which the equipment is to be delivered

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox22
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Name of person at the delivery address that the package is addressed to

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox23
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Phone number AT THE DELIVERY ADDRESS

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox35
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Email address for the delivery contact person

CONTROL.NAME: CommandButton8
CONTROL.CAPTION: Split email
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Copy a persons name and email address into the contact name field, then click this button to split the email address into its own field

CONTROL.NAME: ComboBox1

LIST.CHOICE: To be paid before hire date

CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: The payment status to be printed on the hire invoice

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox31
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Description of any discount given for this hire

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox32
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Percentage discount given (enter xx%)

CONTROL.NAME: CommandButton1
CONTROL.CAPTION: Charity 25%
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Click to insert charity discount field contents

CONTROL.NAME: CommandButton6
CONTROL.CAPTION: Student 25%
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Click to insert student discount field details

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox30
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Any Purchase Order number supplied by the customer to be printed on our invoice

CONTROL.NAME: CommandButton7
CONTROL.CAPTION: Auto Quote
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: This button imports details copied into the customer record from our AutoQuote web page

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox6
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: This is the systems automatically-generated reference for this hire

CONTROL.NAME: CRMConnection23
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Link to customer that this hire booking is for - double-click to open customer screen

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox18
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: The date that the hired equipment was returned to us

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox37
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Initials of staff who unpacked the hire order on its return

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox53
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Date the order was unpacked

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox54
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Time the order was unpacked - useful for checking our CCTV

CONTROL.NAME: CommandButton10
CONTROL.CAPTION: Now
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Click to insert current date and time into "Unpacked Date & Time" fields

CONTROL.NAME: CommandButton18
CONTROL.CAPTION: Today
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Click to insert today's date in the "Actual Return Date"

CONTROL.NAME: CheckBox21
CONTROL.CAPTION: Closed
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Tick to indicate that this hire order record is closed and needs no more updating

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox27
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Notes on returned equipment, put details of anything missing in here, and what was done about it

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox8
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Notes on returned equipment, put details of anything missing in here, and what was done about it

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox36
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Initials of staff who packed the hired equipment

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox52
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Time the order was unpacked - useful for checking our CCTV

CONTROL.NAME: CommandButton9
CONTROL.CAPTION: Now
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Click to insert current date and time into "Packed Date & Time" fields

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox51
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Date the order was packed

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox25
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: This field shows the exact text that will be printed on the hire sheet

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox26
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Insert details of any non-standard items included with this hire - this field's contents get added to the text on the hire sheet

CONTROL.NAME: Label52
CONTROL.CAPTION: All Delivery Address
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: This field contains all the parts of the delivery address, it is updated automatically by the system

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox47
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Read only field containing all of the delivery address in one place for easy copy and pasting

CONTROL.NAME: CheckBox4
CONTROL.CAPTION: Reprogrammed
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Tick if these radios have been programmed to the customer's requirements

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox3
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of radio repeaters included in this order

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox15
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of megaphones hired

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox33
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of sets of 8 "C" cell rechargeable batteries included with this hire

CONTROL.NAME: CheckBox5
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Tick if we gave out one of our Maha 8-slot battery chargers with a megaphone hire booking

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox5
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of metal-detecting security wands hired

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox49
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of PP3 9 volt rechargeable batteries for the security wands included with this hire

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox50
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of chargers for the small 9 volt security wand batteries

CONTROL.NAME: CheckBox1
CONTROL.CAPTION: Walkie Talkie Instructions
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Tick if we are includng the standard walkie-talkie instructions sheet

CONTROL.NAME: CheckBox2
CONTROL.CAPTION: Vehicle/Base Instructions
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Tick if we are includng the vehicle/base radio instructions sheet

CONTROL.NAME: CheckBox3
CONTROL.CAPTION: Megaphone Instructions
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Tick if we are includng the megaphones instructions sheet

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox34
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of vehicle-type radios in this hire

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox42
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of 240 volt AC to 12v DC transformers for using the vehicle radios off "house" power

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox43
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of "cigarette lighter" 12 volt car power leads included in this hire

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox44
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of magnetic-mount aerials in this hire

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox45
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of spring clip-on aerials in this hire

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox48
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of screw-in adapters to allow an external aerial to be attached to a walkie-talkie

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox4
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of standard D-type earpiece/mics in this order

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox1
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of lapel speaker/microphones ("Parrots") included in this hire

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox2
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of lightweight "Madonna" style headsets in this order

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox9
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of leather radio cases with neck straps included in this hire

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox38
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of semi-covert "in-ear" type earpiece/microphones in this hire

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox39
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of "aircraft-style" big headsets in this hire

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox16
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of single walkie-talkie chargers included in this hire

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox28
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of walkie-talkies being hired

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox29
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of six-slot chargers included in this hire

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox7
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of extra walkie-talkie batteries included in this hire (1 battery is assumed with each radio)

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox12
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: The date on which the equipment is to be sent out, or to be collected

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox14
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Date on which we expect the hired equipment to be returned by

CONTROL.NAME: TextBox40
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Number of weeks for the hire from 1 - 4

CONTROL.NAME: CommandButton2
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Click to insert a due back date 1 week ahead (+ 2 days margin)

CONTROL.NAME: CommandButton3
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Click to insert a due back date 2 weeks ahead (+ 2 days margin)

CONTROL.NAME: CommandButton4
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Click to insert a due back date 3 weeks ahead (+ 2 days margin)

CONTROL.NAME: CommandButton5
CONTROL.CAPTION: Mnth
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Click to insert a due back date 4 weeks ahead (+ 2 days margin)

CONTROL.NAME: CheckBox6
CONTROL.CAPTION: Recurring
CONTROL.TOOLTIPTEXT: Tick if this hire is to be extended whenever it runs out
